title: Origins of the situation
desc: Events between 2014 and 2018 that led to the start of the Los Pinares-ECOTEK project and subsequent community resistance to mining activity in Guapinol. Use the arrows to cycle between events.

title: Community resistance to the Los Pinares-ECOTEK project
desc: Community-led campaigns, protests, and demonstrations against the Los Pinares-ECOTEK project in Guapinol. Use the arrows to cycle between events.

title: The use of violence against the environmental defenders
desc: Examples of violence, hostility, and threats against members of the local community involved in opposing the Los Pinares-ECOTEK project. Use the arrows to cycle between events.

title: The criminalisation of environmental defenders
desc: A full timeline of the criminalisation of members of the local community for their opposition to the Los Pinares-ECOTEK project. Use the arrows to cycle between events.

title: The future of the Los Pinares-ECOTEK project
desc: Updates on the current operations of the Los Pinares-ECOTEK project. Use the arrows to cycle between events.

title: Legal action against Los Pinares-ECOTEK and government officials
desc: A timeline of legal action brought forward against Los Pinares-ECOTEK and government officials for their involvement in illegal mining activity in Guapinol. Use the arrows to cycle between events.

title: Developments in the Los Pinares-ECOTEK project
desc: Developments in the Los Pinares-ECOTEK project
